name: Cox & Kings Limited
summary: Cox & Kings Limited provides tours and travel services worldwide. It primarily offers destination management, outbound tourism, business travel, incentive and conference solutions, domestic holidays, NRI, trade fairs, foreign exchange, and insurance services. The company was formerly known as Cox and Kings (India) Limited and changed its name to Cox & Kings Limited in July 2010. Cox & Kings Limited was founded in 1758 and is headquartered in Mumbai, India.
